description: You are a music teacher at an OLPC-equipped school demonstrating the physics of sound to students. Write a Python script that synthesizes a C major scale (8 notes from C4 to C5) as a 16-bit mono PCM WAV file using sine waves and standard A440 equal temperament tuning. Each note must play for exactly 0.5 seconds at a sample rate of 44100 Hz. Save the generated audio to /home/ga/Documents/c_major_scale.wav and create a reference text file at /home/ga/Documents/note_frequencies.txt that lists all 8 note names and their corresponding frequencies in Hz.
